top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    p_promo_id,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN promotion ON ss_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_date BETWEEN '2000-05-25' AND '2000-07-24'
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    p_promo_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100

final.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    p_promo_id,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN promotion ON ss_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_date BETWEEN '2000-05-25' AND '2000-07-24'
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    p_promo_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100
